grace:requirements.goal: Maximize financial asset price prediction metrics for MOEX (Moscow Exchange) instruments via transformer-based time-series modeling, cross-sectional z-score ranking, and multi-strategy backtesting.

scope.instrument: Kronos transformer family (mini/small) — VQ-VAE tokenizer + hierarchical dual-token predictor
scope.data_source: MOEX ISS HTTP API — 10-min OHLCV candles, 20 liquid stocks + IMOEX index
scope.infrastructure: Modal GPU cloud (A100 40GB for training, T4 for inference), local CPU for preprocessing
scope.deliverable: Cross-sectional alpha signal: top-3 long, bottom-2 short, walk-forward validated Sharpe >= 0.5

use_cases.use_case: Fine-tune Kronos-small on MOEX 21-asset data (CE loss on discrete tokens)
Autoregressive inference: Monte Carlo sampling (T=0.6, N=4-5) → OHLCV paths
Signal generation: 7 signal families (atoms, ICT, volatility, VWAP, fractal, divergence, bars)
Strategy execution: 8 strategies (vanilla + BB/OB/VWAP/volatility filters) via shared engine
Walk-forward validation: non-overlapping windows (step=pred_len=6), strict temporal split
Calibration: 4-pass hyperparameter sweep (pred_len, T, consensus, TP/SL)
Template adaptation: reference strategies/experiments for new instruments/assets

non_goals.non_goal: Non-MOEX markets (extensible but not initial scope)

success_criteria.criterion: Phase 0 tokenizer quality gates: codebook_util >= 200, entropy >= 5.0, recon_mse <= 0.01
Phase 1 fine-tune: validation CE loss decreases and converges within 30 epochs
Phase 2 backtest: Sharpe >= 0.5, Win Rate >= 52%, MaxDD <= 25%, PSR >= 0.7, IC mean >= 0.02
Leakage audit: 8/8 temporal/feature/consensus leakage tests passed
GRACE integrity: grace lint --profile autonomous passes without errors
